description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and a mix of white and wooden exterior finishes. The structure is surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and includes a driveway leading to a garage on one side. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, allowing for ample natural light inside. The front entrance is marked by a small porch area with steps and a red door, while the backyard is enclosed and features a green lawn. The building appears to be single-story, with a combination of open and covered outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a blend of contemporary and natural materials.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and wood exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard with driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, rectangular shape, wooden fence, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, garage, main entrance with porch, and grouped windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear facade, backyard lawn, and additional large windows.
description_view_3: Back view showing the enclosed yard, rear windows, and the depth of the building layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and large side windows
